title: Intensely Crunchy Russian Dough Dumplings
description: A traditional Russian dish featuring crunchy yeast dough dumplings, served with a side of nimono simmer and a touch of yellow food coloring, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Once the oil is hot, punch down the dough and shape it into small dumplings.
Fry the dumplings until they are golden brown and crunchy, about 5 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the dumplings from the oil and place them on a paper towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small saucepan, heat the nimono simmer sauce over low heat.
Add the yellow food coloring to the simmer sauce and stir to combine.
Serve the crunchy dumplings with the nimono simmer sauce.
